query_title: Return to House on Haunted Hill

recommendations.title: The Communion Girl
recommendations.overview: May, 1987. While returning from a nightclub and after having taken drugs, new girl in town Sara and her friend Rebe find a doll wearing a communion dress. From that moment, their lives will become a living hell.

recommendations.title: An Affair to Die For
recommendations.overview: A weekend get-away for two lovers turns into a nightmare of psychological mind games when their infidelity is discovered.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Revelations
recommendations.overview: Two friends in Mexico discover the Lament Configuration and unleash Pinhead, but one decides to try to survive by swapping himself with someone else. Once they go missing, family members go in search of them, but find Pinhead instead.

recommendations.title: Mirrors 2
recommendations.overview: When Max, who is recovering from a traumatic accident, takes a job as a nighttime security guard, he begins to see visions of a young mysterious woman in the store's mirror.

recommendations.title: The Damned
recommendations.overview: After suffering the recent loss of his wife, David Reynolds decides to take his family on a cathartic trip to her home village in Columbia. While en route, they get into a car accident and seek refuge in a secluded inn. While there they find a myster

recommendations.title: A Little Princess
recommendations.overview: When her father enlists to fight for the British in WWI, young Sara Crewe goes to New York to attend the same boarding school her late mother attended. She soon clashes with the severe headmistress, Miss Minchin, who attempts to stifle Sara's creativ

recommendations.title: Exterritorial
recommendations.overview: When her son vanishes inside a US consulate, ex-special forces soldier Sara does everything in her power to find him — and uncovers a dark conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Sara's Notebook
recommendations.overview: Laura has spent years looking for her sister Sara who went missing in the depths of the jungle in the Congo. Neither the NGO she works for, nor the embassy, have news on her whereabouts until a photo appears of Sara in a mining town. Apparently, Sara

recommendations.title: Altar
recommendations.overview: A young family find themselves in serious danger when they move to an isolated haunted house in the Yorkshire Moors.

recommendations.title: The Influence
recommendations.overview: After moving back to her family home to care for her dying mother, a nurse haunted by her childhood memories must struggle with an evil force in the house.
